dict.string: Riskmate needs camera access to capture safety evidence and document hazards on site.
Riskmate uses the microphone for voice search so you can say things like "high risk jobs" or "blockers".
Riskmate uses speech recognition to turn your voice into search text for jobs and hazards.
Riskmate needs photo library access to attach existing images as safety evidence.
Riskmate needs to save captured images to your photo library.
